promotion_reason: Continuation of C3 low-bank forward seam from pass 191. C3:2900-2AFF frozen as mixed data (high BRK density, no xref targets). C3:2B00-2BFF promoted as branch-fed arithmetic pocket with hardware division ($4204), possible multiplication ($4202), cross-bank JSL to C3:0E29, 9 JSR calls to C3 low-bank utilities, and table-driven computation. BMI $2C01 at C3:2BF9 confirms cross-page flow into C3:2C00.
